name: chp
description: Code quality enforcement with traffic laws and automated violation detection

interface.shortDescription: Enforce code-quality laws via git and agent hooks
interface.longDescription: CHP (Code Highway Patrol) is a static analysis framework that enforces rules ("laws") through git hooks and agent hooks. Each law has a verify.sh script that runs on commit/push and can block violations. After repeated failures, guidance is auto-strengthened so agents avoid the same mistake.
